Non-binding Heads of Terms — Project JADE; Deal ID: HKO‑VA‑24‑0Ξ7; C O N F I D E N T I A L (SFO/Part XIVA) — date: 02 Jun 2026.
Parties: Aurora Vantage Holdings Limited (Main Board‑listed; HKEX) as Buyer; Seabright Crypto Custody Limited (VATP applicant; Hong Kong) as Target.
Transaction: Buyer to acquire 70% of Target for HKD 418,000,000 cash + earn‑out up to HKD 82,000,000 tied to onboarding of ESG‑linked tokenised carbon certificates under CSA‑KPI.
Conditions precedent: SFC approvals (SFO licence variations), HKEX Chapter 14 requirements, completion of cyber security remediation plan, and no selective disclosure prior to joint announcement.
Inside information & insider list: This term sheet and Target’s May–Jul pipeline constitute inside information; maintain an insider list (Annex A) limited to Ms. Aria Fong, Mr. Kelvin Yip, and wall‑crossed advisors only; blackout windows apply to Buyer’s directors.
Information barriers: Trading and treasury desks shall remain walled off from Project JADE; any wall‑crossing requires pre‑clearance and written acknowledg ement under the SFC Code of Conduct.
Cyber incident (non‑public): On 12‑May‑2026 Target detected a contained ransomware attempt affecting a non‑production vault node; no client private keys compromised; warranty, indemnity cap 12% for cyber breaches.
Virtual assets scope: Target provides institutional custody for stablecoins and tokenised climate units; no proprietary trading; closing conditional on satisfactory review of fiat‑referenced stablecoin governance under forthcoming HK framework.
Announcement protocol: No analyst or investor meetings until HKEX‑compliant joint announcement; avoid tipping and refrain from disclosing deal metrics in any selective channel, including encrypted chat.
Consideration mechanics: 10% escrow at completion; 6‑month lockup for sellers; earn‑out based on verified carbon‑avoidance attestations audited by GreenScope (fictional) with price‑adjustment collar ±5%.
Benign operations note: our ESG e‑learning deck uses the words “crypto custody” and “cyber hygiene” in generic training examples only and is not a deal communication or price‑sensitive disclosure.
Negative MAC carve‑outs: General VA market volatility, changes in public ESG taxonomies, or failure of the non‑binding climate pilot shall not constitute a Material Adverse Change.
Dataroom: hxxps://vault.auroravantage.hk/rooms/JADE/login?tok=va‑7f_1l%2Dtk&user=kelvin.yip%2Bext; meeting code C O N F ‑ 2 9 1 3 ‑ HKEX.
Contacts: Ms. Aria Fong, Head of Corporate Dev., aria.fong@auroravantage.hk, +852 6 8 2 9 3 4 7 0; or Mr. Lionel Tse, external counsel, lionel.tse@chamberlane‑law.hk.
